features: CR1 3N BATTERY Designed with exceptional durability, reliable performance, and high capacity, making it ideal for a wide range of applications - CR 1/3N BATTERY
PERFECT FOR Electronic pet collars, smart home devices, light meters, medical devices, car key fobs, garage door openers, laser pointers, motion sensors, and many more uses
EXTREME CONDITIONS - CR 1/3N battery suitable for operation under extreme temperatures ranging from -40°C to +60°C
LONG SHELF LIFE The ABSINA DL 1/3N 3V small battery 3V offers a shelf life of up to 10 years, allowing you to use it at a later time without any issues
PACKAGE INCLUDES 1x CR-1/3N Battery Lithium (160mAh) / Dimensions: 11.8 x 10.8 mm / Weight: 3.3 g / Replaces CR11108, 2L76, and all compatible cells - CR1 battery
